source: docs/SHB_Corporate_Sales_MVP_Data_Blueprint_V3_Proposal.docx section 9.12 Table 196 (hero case COMP-ABC, values given verbatim in the document) plus two regression companies added to cover a clean-pass path and a hard-block path, per section 9.10's '10 synthetic companies / 3 hồ sơ: một hero case + hai regression cases' requirement.
note: customer_id values (COMP-ABC, COMP-XYZ, COMP-MP) intentionally reuse the identifiers already recognized by this repo's existing IAM/demo persona scope (managed_customer_ids in app/integrations/enterprise.py), so this V3 pack can be exercised against the running app without an identity collision. operating_years for COMP-ABC is NOT stated anywhere in the blueprint text; it is marked ASSUMPTION per section 20.3's explicit labeling convention, since RULE-CREDIT-OPERATING-YEARS style checks need a value and the document only implies the company is established ('nhiều nhà cung cấp và dòng tiền phân tán').

companies.legal_name: Công ty CP ABC Việt Nam

operating_years.note: Not stated in blueprint; company is described as established with distributed cash flow and multiple suppliers, which implies a multi-year operating history but no explicit figure. Chosen to comfortably pass SYNTH-RULE-WC-YEARS-001 (>=2) so the working-capital block in this dataset traces only to the UBO/BCTC gap the blueprint actually specifies.

companies.branch_or_unit_note: 6 tài khoản tại 3 đơn vị (per blueprint Table 196)

financial_statements.note: BCTC năm gần nhất chưa có, per blueprint section 3.1/9.12

ubo_declaration.note: UBO chưa có, per blueprint section 3.1/9.12

companies.legal_name: Công ty TNHH Bán lẻ XYZ
companies.branch_or_unit_note: 1 cửa hàng chính, chưa có nhu cầu cash management đa tài khoản
2 tài khoản, 1 đơn vị phân phối
